name: Add Feature to Express API
description: Add a DELETE endpoint to an existing Express REST API
goal: This Express API has GET, POST, and PUT endpoints for /api/items. Add a DELETE /api/items/:id endpoint that removes an item from the in-memory store. Return 200 { deleted: true } on success, 404 { error: 'not found' } if the item does not exist. All existing tests must continue to pass and the new endpoint must be tested.
